expected_workflow: Agent introduces itself and asks if patient is ready
Agent explains Bluetooth check and calls check_connect
Agent explains device pairing and calls pair_device
Agent explains ECG recording step and calls recording_request
Patient reports device out of range during recording
Agent acknowledges issue and asks patient to move closer to device
Patient moves closer and confirms ready
Agent calls check_record_ECG_correctly - returns 'ECG record saved successfully'
Agent calls finish_recording and provides completion summary

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Hello! I'm MediECG-Agent, your medical assistant AI. I'm here to help you record an ECG using your Bluetooth ECG sensor.

Are you ready to begin?

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Yes, I'm ready. The device is on the table next to me.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect!

**Step 1 — Bluetooth Check**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully check

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Your Bluetooth is enabled.

**Step 2 — Device Pairing**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Pairing request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! Please confirm when the ECG sensor is connected.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Device paired successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect!

**Step 3 — ECG Recording**

I will now start a 60-second ECG recording. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: The recording has started. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Device out of range! Recording stopped.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
I see the device went out of range during the recording, which caused it to stop.

**What we need to do:**

1. Make sure the ECG device is within range of your phone (usually within 10 meters)
2. Keep the device close to your phone during the recording

Please move the device closer to your phone and let me know when you're ready to try again.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: Okay, I moved it right next to my phone. It's connected again. Let's try again.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Great!

**Step 3 — ECG Recording (Retry)**

I will now start another 60-second ECG recording. Please remain still and keep the device close.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: Recording request sent successfully

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: The recording has started. Please remain still.

conversation.speaker: Human
conversation.text: ECG recording completed

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text: Excellent! Now let me check if your ECG was saved correctly.

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: ECG record saved successfully.

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
Perfect! Your ECG recording has been successfully saved.

**Step 5 — Finish**

conversation.speaker: Tool
conversation.text: we succesfully notify

conversation.speaker: IoT Agent
conversation.text:
**Recording Complete!**

Your ECG recording is now complete and all your clinical data has been saved successfully.

connectivity_issues.issue: Device out of range during recording
connectivity_issues.resolution: Patient moved device closer to phone

error_logs.patient_feedback: Device out of range! Recording stopped.
